title: Potential online school outcome (Sep 2020 3-line forecast)
html:
TL;DR

  • Sept 25, 2020 — three-line forecast doc Yahir writes at the start of his fully-online senior year at Brogden high school.
  • Predicted outcomes: (1) "Only input coming in, with very limited output. Listen Only Mode." (2) "Chinese-like learning" — passive-receptive mode. (3) "New expression being used online, through text."
  • The "Listen Only Mode" frame anticipates the consumption-vs-production imbalance that recurs across the pandemic era notes — and ironically resolves itself by Yahir over-producing in writing (this doc is one such output).
  • "Chinese-like learning" — striking foreshadow: 4.5 years before the Shanghai program, Yahir's frame for "absorbing without speaking" is already coded "Chinese."
  • "New expression being used online, through text" — proto-articulation of the internet vernacular shift that surfaces in his later .

Why this matters

  • A 3-line forecast doc — minimal content, high-density signal. The COVID-era output-pattern wasn't accidental; Yahir named it as it began.
  • One of the dated origin points for the passive-input mode Yahir later names "Listen Only Mode" — adjacent in spirit to note as letter to self and fear of not doing.

Connections

brogden · covid pandemic era · 2020 04 07 what a strange time indeed · shanghai study abroad · google docs junk drawer

related.label: What a strange time indeed — early-COVID monologue from Dad's living room
